headline: Jaidon Anthony
body: Brentford confirm Jaidon Anthony has joined on a four-year contract.🐝 Ben Jacobs (JacobsBen) Jaidon Anthony set to join Brentford from Burnley on a four-year contract. £15m+£2m fee.🐝 —
raw_text:
Brentford confirm Jaidon Anthony has joined on a four-year contract.🐝




Ben Jacobs (@JacobsBen)

Jaidon Anthony set to join Brentford from Burnley on a four-year contract. £15m+£2m fee.🐝





— https://nitter.net/JacobsBen/status/2073783567222730841#m
